---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for ClipToAll
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

A clear and concise description of the problem or need this feature would
address. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features
you have considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
